name: mutation-testing
description: Add Stryker mutation testing for TypeScript projects that use Vitest.

optionalScripts.quality:gate:deep: npm run quality:gate && npm run mutation:incremental

docs: Document npm run mutation as the mutation testing command.
Document the explicit deep local gate when local mutation feedback is desired.
Document .stryker-tmp/ as an ignored temporary sandbox.
notes: Adapt src/ mutation globs before applying to repos with a different runtime source directory.
Keep mutation testing out of fast pre-push hooks unless the target repo explicitly accepts the runtime cost.
Do not weaken existing mutation thresholds without explicit approval.
